moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 underway
moments.blurb: The world-famous tennis tournament, The Championships, Wimbledon, is in full swing at the All England Club in London, running from June 29 to July 12.

angles.name: Opening Week Buzz
angles.copy: It's the first full week of Wimbledon 2026! Who are you backing to make it to the finals on the iconic grass courts?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Nothing says British summer like Wimbledon. Time for strawberries and cream, Pimm's, and world-class tennis.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival concludes
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival, a five-day celebration of music and arts, concludes tomorrow, July 1st, set against the backdrop of the iconic stately home.

angles.name: Final Day at Blenheim
angles.copy: Last chance to soak up the atmosphere at Blenheim Palace Festival today and tomorrow! What a stunning setting for music and arts.

angles.name: Palace Vibes
angles.copy: From classical to contemporary, Blenheim Palace Festival has brought a unique blend of culture to Oxfordshire. Who made it down?

moments.title: Lytham Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, a major UK music event, begins tomorrow, July 1st, running until July 5th on Lytham Green.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Lytham Festival 2026 starts tomorrow! Get ready for five days of incredible music on Lytham Green.

angles.name: North West Summer
angles.copy: Planning your Lytham Festival weekend? We're sending good vibes for sunshine and brilliant sets! What acts are you most excited for?

moments.title: Debbie Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday tomorrow, July 1st.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Blondie
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! Still looking and sounding incredible.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Rapture', Debbie Harry shaped music history. Celebrating her 81st birthday tomorrow!

moments.title: Missy Elliott turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday tomorrow, July 1st.

angles.name: Birthday for Missy
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott! Still bringing the fire with every track.

angles.name: Queen of Hip Hop
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate Missy Elliott's 55th! What's your favourite Missy track or video?

moments.title: John Farnham turns 77
moments.blurb: Australian pop and rock legend John Farnham, known for hits like 'You're the Voice', celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow, July 1st.

angles.name: A Voice for John
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the incredible John Farnham! 'You're the Voice' remains an absolute anthem.

moments.title: Gate To Southwell Festival starts
moments.blurb: The Gate To Southwell Festival, celebrating folk, roots, and acoustic music, begins on July 2nd and runs until July 5th.

angles.name: Roots Festival
angles.copy: Get ready for four days of fantastic folk and roots music as Gate To Southwell Festival kicks off on Thursday!

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Lord's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary Vince Clarke! Responsible for some of the greatest synth-pop anthems ever.

angles.name: Erasure Icon
angles.copy: From Depeche Mode to Erasure, Vince Clarke's influence is undeniable. Wishing him a fantastic 66th birthday on Friday!

moments.title: Shane Lynch turns 50
moments.blurb: Boyzone member Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Boyzone at 50
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Boyzone's Shane Lynch on Friday! Where does the time go?

moments.title: Love Supreme Festival begins
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival, the UK's only greenfield jazz festival, runs from July 3rd to 5th.

angles.name: Jazz in the Park
angles.copy: Love Supreme Festival kicks off this Friday! Who's heading to Glynde Place for a weekend of incredible jazz, funk, and soul?

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: The sun's out (hopefully!) for Love Supreme this weekend. Get ready for some smooth tunes and good vibes.

moments.title: Maverick Festival starts
moments.blurb: The Maverick Festival, the UK's original Americana festival, takes place from July 3rd to 5th.

angles.name: Americana Weekend
angles.copy: Dust off your cowboy boots, Maverick Festival is back this weekend for a celebration of Americana music!

moments.title: Todd In The Hole Festival begins
moments.blurb: The Todd In The Hole Festival, a family-friendly music festival, runs from July 3rd to 5th.

source.l: Todd In The Hole Official Site

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Todd In The Hole Festival kicks off this Friday! Perfect for a family weekend of music and good times.

moments.title: John Waite turns 74
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter John Waite, known for his work with The Babys, Bad English, and solo hits, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Missing You at 74
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the voice behind 'Missing You', John Waite! A true rock legend.

moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum artist Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Cheers to Posty
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone! What's your top Posty track?

angles.name: Hitmaker at 31
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st birthday on Saturday! From 'Circles' to 'Sunflower', he's given us so many hits.

moments.title: Huey Lewis turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: It's the Power of Love
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to Huey Lewis! Still feeling 'The Power of Love' for this 80s icon.

angles.name: News at 76
angles.copy: Wishing Huey Lewis a very happy 76th birthday on Sunday! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News song?

moments.title: RZA turns 57
moments.blurb: RZA, the influential leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the mastermind, RZA! His influence on hip-hop is immeasurable.

moments.title: Shane Filan turns 47
moments.blurb: Westlife heartthrob Shane Filan celebrates his 47th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Westlife's Shane at 47
angles.copy: Happy 47th Birthday to Westlife's Shane Filan! Still got us 'Flying Without Wings'.

angles.name: Boyband Legend
angles.copy: Wishing Shane Filan a very happy 47th birthday on Sunday! What's your favourite Westlife ballad?

moments.title: 2000 Trees Festival approaches
moments.blurb: The 2000 Trees Festival, a multi-award-winning independent rock and alternative festival, takes place from July 8th to 11th.

angles.name: Trees is Coming
angles.copy: Just a few days until 2000 Trees Festival kicks off! Get ready for four days of the best in rock and alternative.

angles.name: Rock Out in Cheltenham
angles.copy: Who's heading to Upcote Farm for 2000 Trees next week? The countdown is on!

moments.title: Debbie Sledge turns 72
moments.blurb: Debbie Sledge, a member of the iconic disco group Sister Sledge, celebrates her 72nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: We Are Family Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to Debbie Sledge! Thank you for the timeless anthems.

angles.name: Disco Diva
angles.copy: Celebrating Debbie Sledge's 72nd birthday next week! 'We Are Family' forever.

moments.title: Jim Kerr turns 67
moments.blurb: Jim Kerr, lead singer of the Scottish rock band Simple Minds, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Simple Minds at 67
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Simple Minds frontman, Jim Kerr! Still giving us those iconic stadium anthems.

angles.name: Scottish Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing Jim Kerr a very happy 67th birthday next week! From 'Don't You (Forget About Me)' to 'Alive and Kicking', a true legend.

moments.title: Marc Almond turns 69
moments.blurb: Marc Almond, known for his work with Soft Cell and a successful solo career, celebrates his 69th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Tainted Love Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the distinctive voice of Marc Almond! A true electronic music pioneer.

moments.title: Courtney Love turns 62
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Courtney
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the fierce and iconic Courtney Love! Still rocking it after all these years.

angles.name: Hole's Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating Courtney Love's 62nd birthday next week! What's your favourite Hole track?

moments.title: Jack White turns 51
moments.blurb: The White Stripes frontman and acclaimed solo artist Jack White celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: White Stripes Whiz
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White! From 'Seven Nation Army' to his solo work, a true guitar hero.

angles.name: Guitar Hero at 51
angles.copy: Wishing Jack White a very happy 51st birthday next week! What's your favourite White Stripes song?

moments.title: Also Festival starts
moments.blurb: Also Festival, a festival of ideas, music, and food, takes place from July 10th to 12th.

angles.name: Ideas & Music
angles.copy: Also Festival kicks off next Friday! A unique blend of talks, workshops, music, and great food.
